mapping.production: ul[data-testid=allergen-panel-grid] → li per EU14 code + Badge chip
three-state token: present→Badge danger, trace→Badge warning, absent→Badge muted (deviation D3)

mapping.prototype: alert alert-amber "N allergen(s) detected: … Must be declared on label." (recipe.jsx:113-116)

shadcn_translation.div.alert.alert-amber: div[role="alert"] (no Alert primitive in @monopilot/ui — T-040 convention, deviation D2)
shadcn_translation.window.NPD_ALLERGENS (11-item PRD partia: EU14_ALLERGEN_CODES constant (14, EU FIC 1169/2011, deviation D1)
shadcn_translation.calc.allergens (window mock): AllergenStatus[] prop ← T-117 maps RecomputeResult.allergens (T-065) + fa_allergen_cascade (T-038)

deviations: D1 — EU14 (14) rendered, superset of prototype window.NPD_ALLERGENS (11); prototype data.jsx flags its allergen list as a PRD partial belonging to 09-QUALITY/03-TECHNICAL. Task contract + EU FIC 1169/2011 mandate EU14.
D2 — role="alert" region instead of shadcn Alert: @monopilot/ui has no Alert primitive; follows the T-040 AllergenCascadeWidget convention. AC ("role=alert") satisfied.
D3 — three-state status (absent/trace/present) instead of the prototype binary on/off, per the task contract AllergenStatus shape; trace → amber.
D4 — Playwright pixel screenshots + jest-axe deferred (editor wiring T-117, Playwright parity T-118, jest-axe not a dep / out of STRICT SCOPE). RTL DOM-snapshot + role/aria fallback provided per AC5.
D5 — loading/error/permission-denied owned by parent editor (T-117); panel is controlled synchronous presentation, states captured as presence permutations.
